warnings: logP from semi-empirical ΔG_solv differences is screening-grade; ±1 log unit typical.

Each leg is an electronic-energy difference on a single frozen geometry — no ZPE/thermal/entropy and no per-phase relaxation. The reported delta_G_solv_* legs are electronic only; the 1 atm→1 M standard-state term cancels in the water–octanol difference, so logP itself is insensitive to it, but the individual legs are not corrected ΔG*_solv.
For chemoinformatic logP, also consider RDKit's Crippen/XLogP (group-contribution).

Single-conformer result: every species was evaluated at ONE geometry, with no conformational/Boltzmann averaging. For a flexible molecule the Boltzmann-averaged free energy over conformers can differ from a single conformer by several kcal mol⁻¹ — shifting pKa by >1 unit, E° by >0.1 V, and logP by >0.5. If the molecule has rotatable bonds, run conformer-search first and average, or treat this as a screening estimate tied to the input geometry.

prose:
Method provenance.
Property: Octanol–water partition coefficient logP (dimensionless, base-10 logarithm of the concentration ratio C_octanol/C_water).
Level of theory: semi-empirical tight-binding GFN2-xTB (xtb), no Gaussian basis; implicit-solvation energies obtained with xtb’s ALPB/GBSA continuum models.
Geometry provenance: fixed input geometry from /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/logp-partition-validation/diethyl-ether/diethyl_ether.xyz (single conformer supplied by the user), not re-optimized at xtb. The logP calculation is therefore a single-point electronic ΔG_solv difference at that geometry (GFN2-xTB//input_xyz).
Environment: implicit water and implicit 1-octanol for the two solvation legs; the reference gas-phase energy used xtb’s gas-phase Hamiltonian. No explicit solvent molecules.
Charge and multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software/backend: xtb via chemkit logp-partition skill (xtb version as shipped with chemkit; version string not included in the JSON).
Convergence & caveats: electronic single points converged; skill returned integrity.status "ok" (trustworthy=true). Engine warnings reproduced verbatim below. No geometry optimization or conformer averaging was performed.
Live .out log: the run streamed to a file named logp_<timestamp>.out in the working directory; JSON results were written to /var/folders/ym/_02kbfyd29z17l376783nlm00000gn/T/tmpv08jh5nt/live.json (path from cli_invocation). You can inspect the full SCF cycles and solver messages there.

Headline result (GFN2-xTB, gas phase geometry, implicit-solvation difference):
logP = 1.5524782
